zh.lifeSummary: 當Griffith Bowen於1600年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯時，他的父親Francis Bowen26歲，母親Elen Franklen25歲。他於大約1627年與Margaret Fleming在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1650年住在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞。他去世於1676年在英國倫敦享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Griffith Bowen于1600年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯时，他的父亲Francis Bowen26岁，母亲Elen Franklen25岁。他于大约1627年与Margaret Fleming在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1650年住在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞。他去世于1676年在英国倫敦享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bowen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Owain ‘son of Owain’ (see Owen ), with fused patronymic marker (a)p, which is normally voiced before a vowel.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’, a diminutive of Buadhach ‘victorious’ (see Bohan ).
Irish: used to ‘translate’ Ó Cnáimhín ‘descendant of Cnáimhín’, a personal name meaning ‘little bone’ or ‘little body’, see Nevin 1.

variants.name: Bowan
meanings: Irish: variant of Bowen 2, from Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’.

variants.name: Bowens
meanings: Welsh, Irish (Mayo), and English: variant of Bowen , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Owen
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Griffith Bowen was born in 1600, in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Francis Bowen, was 26 and his mother, Elen Franklen, was 25. He married Margaret Fleming about 1627, in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales in 1650. He died in 1676, in London, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Griffith Bowen est né en 1600, à Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Francis Bowen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elen Franklen, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fleming environ 1627, à Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles en 1650. Il est décédé en 1676, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Griffith Bowen è nato il nel 1600 nel Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Francis Bowen, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elen Franklen, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fleming circa 1627, nel Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles nel 1650. Morì nel 1676, nel London, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Griffith Bowenが1600年にウェールズグラモーガンランジェニスで生まれた時，父Francis Bowenは26歳，母Elen Franklenは25歳であった。約1627年にウェールズグラモーガンランジェニスでMargaret Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1650年にはウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアに住んでいた。彼は1676年にイギリスロンドンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Griffith Bowen(이)가 1600년 웨일스 글램르건 랭니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Bowen(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen Franklen(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1627년 웨일스 글램르건 랭니스에서 Margaret Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1650년도에 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 살았다. 그는 1676년 영국 런던에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Griffith Bowen nasceu em 1600, em Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Francis Bowen, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elen Franklen, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fleming aproximadamente 1627, em Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales em 1650. Ele faleceu em 1676, em London, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Griffith Bowen родился в 1600 г. в местности ллангеннит, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Francis Bowen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen Franklen, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fleming около 1627 г. в местности ллангеннит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс в 1650 году. Он умер в 1676 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Griffith Bowen nació en 1600, en Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Francis Bowen, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elen Franklen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Fleming aproximadamente 1627, en Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales en 1650. Murió en 1676, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
